title: Aaron Davis (Earth-1610)
content:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Aaron Davis}} {{Youmay|Prowler of [[Earth-1610]]|a [[Miles Morales (Earth-42)|different prowler]]}} {{CharacterTabber}} {{Character |name = Prowler |image = Aaron Davis (E-1610) 001.png|Aaron Davis Aaron Davis (E-1610) 002.png|Prowler |fullname = Aaron Davis |alias = '''Codenames'''
Prowler''[[Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse]]''
'''Derivatives'''
Aaron |titles = Uncle Aaron
Uncle |counterpart = * [[Aaron Davis (Earth-42)]] * [[Aaron Davis (Earth-199999)]] |universe = [[Earth-1610]] |location = Brooklyn, New York City |occupation = Assassin |identity = Secret |status = Deceased |born = [[Before_21st_Century/Earth-1610|1970s]] |died = [[2010s/Earth-1610|December 2018]] |age = 41 |affiliation = * [[Wilson Fisk (Earth-1610)|Kingpin]] |marital Status = Single |relatives = * [[Jefferson Morales (Earth-1610)|Jefferson Morales]] (older brother) * [[Rio Morales (Earth-1610)|Rio Morales]] (sister-in-law) * [[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|Miles Morales]] (nephew) * [[Maria Morales (Earth-1610)|Maria Morales]] (sister-in-law) |species = Human |ethnicity = African American |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |skin color = Black |eyes = Brown |hair = N/A (bald, formerly black) |appearances = * ''[[Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse]]'' * ''[[Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse]]'' (flashback and hologram) |voice actor = [[Mahershala Ali]] |actor =}} {{Quote|I'm sorry. I wanted you to look up to me. I let you down, man. I let you down. You're the best of all of us, Miles. You're on your way. Just keep going.|Aaron Davis' last words to Miles|Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse}} '''Aaron Davis''' was the uncle of [[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|Miles Morales]] and brother of [[Jefferson Morales (Earth-1610)|Jefferson Morales]]. Aaron operated as a masked criminal known as the '''Prowler''' who worked for the [[Wilson Fisk (Earth-1610)|Kingpin]] and had gone up against [[Peter Parker (Earth-1610)|Spider-Man]] on multiple ocassions. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== {{Biography Quote|You know, me and your dad used to do this back in the day."
"Stop lyin'."
"It's true. Then he took on the cop thing, and I don't know...|Aaron Davis and [[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|Miles Morales]]|Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse}} In their youth, Aaron and his brother [[Jefferson Morales (Earth-1610)|Jeff]] were very close and apparently used to tag walls with graffiti. When Jeff started on the path to becoming a law enforcer, he and Aaron drifted apart. Jeff went on to marry and have a child, [[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|Miles Morales]], with whom Aaron developed a close bond with. Though estranged from Jeff, the boy visited him often and became like a second father figure to him. At one point, Aaron became the masked villain and mercenary known as the Prowler who started working as a prominent hit man and main enforcer for the [[Wilson Fisk (Earth-1610)|Kingpin]]. As Prowler, Aaron Davis would became one of the many supervillains that [[Peter Parker (Earth-1610)|Spider-Man]] fought in his ten years as a superhero. Sometime later, he started to assist Wilson Fisk in his plan with the super-collider. ===Hanging out with Miles=== {{Biography Quote|Tomorrow, find that [[Gwen Stacy (Earth-65)|girl]]. You walk up to her and be like: 'Hey.' "
"You serious, Uncle Aaron?"
"I'm tellin' you, man, it's science!|Aaron Davis and [[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|Miles Morales]]|Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse}}[[File:Miles and Aaron (E-1610) 001.png|thumb|left]] On Miles' third week at his [[Brooklyn Visions Academy|new school]], Miles paid him a visit in his home. Opening with small talk, Aaron asked if he was having girl problems and gave him advice: the shoulder touch, which Miles found ridiculous (but tried anyway the following day). Seeing that the boy needed a pick-me-up, Aaron took him to an abandoned subway terminal beneath Brooklyn — one he knew of from accompanying Fisk to the Super-Collider — and encouraged him to tag the wall with his newest piece. Admiring the piece, Aaron encouraged the boy to keep going. ===Death of Spider-Man=== ====Last Battle with Spider-Man==== {{Biography Quote|Prowler. Man, I was in the middle of something.|[[Peter Parker (Earth-1610)|Spider-Man]] to Prowler|Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse}} The following evening, Prowler is sent by Kingpin to assist Green Goblin in fighting Spider-Man and manages to keep the hero from deactivating the super-collider. After the Green Goblin ended up killed thanks to one of the [[Super-Collider]]'s tests that ended in its temporary destruction, the Prowler, Kingpin, and [[Lonnie Lincoln (Earth-1610)|Tombstone]] cornered an injured [[Peter Parker (Earth-1610)|Spider-Man]], Prowler would be ordered by the Kingpin to kill Spider-Man, however before he had the chance to finish him, he would be stopped by Fisk who wanted to hear what Spider-Man wanted to say sometime later he would witness how the hero was then killed by the Kingpin himself. ====[[Chase of Miles Morales]]==== Seconds later, they would heard and saw a [[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|boy]] fleeing the scene and Prowler gave chase, under orders from Kingpin to kill him, pursuing the boy on a subway train he nearly runs him over. However, as he was getting on his motorcycle and pursues the boy, who had fortunately hidden himself, this would causing Prowler to drive in the wrong direction. Becoming occupied with hunting the witness, Aaron became unreachable to both Miles and Jeff, who, in a rare occurrence, called him to find out where Miles was. ===[[Collider Crisis]]=== ====Conflict with the Spider-People==== {{Biography Quote|If the kid's out there, I'll find him. You know me, sir. I don't ever quit.|Prowler to Kingpin about finding [[Miles Morales|his target]]|Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse}} [[File:Spidey vs Prowler (Miles E-1610) 001.png|thumb]] Coming home the following evening, Aaron felt a presence in his room and eventually realized that his target, the small boy from the night before, was in his apartment and was escaping. He followed him once again but this time allowed some distance between them, making the boy relax enough to think he was no longer being followed and then tracked him to the rest of the [[Spider-Gang|Spider-People]]. ====Death==== {{Biography Quote|I'm sorry. I wanted you to look up to me. I let you down, man. I let you down. You're the best of all of us, Miles. You're on your way. Just keep goin', Just keep goin'.|Aaron Davis's final words to [[Miles Morales]]|Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse}}[[File:Miles and Aaron (E-1610) 002.png|thumb|left|Aaron and Miles both stranded in their huge, unintended mess.]] During the raid, their group tried to grab the [[goober]]; while the others were engaged in battle with the other Spider-People, Aaron followed the boy who was last spotted with the device and was about to kill him before he unmasked himself, revealing him to be [[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|Miles]]. Kingpin saw Aaron's hesitation and ordered him to kill the boy. Aaron silently refused and put Miles' mask back on. While stepping away, Fisk retaliated by shooting him. Miles swung away with Aaron's body and they were followed by his brother, Jeff. Just before he succumbed to his wounds, Aaron apologized to Miles for letting him down and asked him to continue on his current path. [[File:Aaron and Jeff (E-1610) 002.png|thumb]] Jeff arrived just as he died and was left with the impression that Spider-Man had killed him. Miles escaped, and Jeff mourned his brother's death. ===Legacy=== {{Biography Quote|You ever hear of the shoulder touch?"
"What?"
"Hey|[[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|Spider-Man]] to [[Wilson Fisk (Earth-1610)|Kingpin]]|Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse}} Later, Jefferson arrives at Miles' school to tell him of Aaron's fate while he tries to apologize for his mistakes that he made to Miles and believes that he will not talk to him . However, Miles finally embraces his powers and becomes the new Spider-Man through the words of inspiration of his parents, uncle and Peter B. Parker. After that, he then helps return the Spider-People to their dimensions, defeats Kingpin by using the shoulder-touch technique Aaron taught him to blast Kingpin with a Venom-Strike, clearing his name, and becomes the new Spider-Man. In addition, Miles and Jefferson spray paint a memorial to Aaron at the police station Jefferson works at, showing that Jefferson has fully forgiven his brother despite not approving of his past. Aaron's death is featured in the presentation that Miguel gives to Miles about canon events. ==Personality== {{Biography Quote|I have an uncle Aaron too. I had. He was a bad guy, called the Prowler. He looked out for me. He did a lot of bad things but, I knew he wanted to be good. He just didn't had the choice but you do.|[[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|Miles Morales]] to [[Aaron Davis (Earth-42)|Aaron Davis]]|Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse}} As an uncle, Aaron was caring, laid-back, and a good friend to [[Miles Morales|Miles]], freeing him of any kind of expectations that his parents often put on him. Although he was estranged from his brother, Jeff, they both still have a sense of care for one another. {{Biography Quote|You know me, sir. I don't ever quit.|Prowler to [[Wilson Fisk|Kingpin]]|Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse}} As the Prowler, Aaron was terrifying and one of the most dangerous villains in [[Earth-1610|New York]]. The Prowler was quick to catch up to and track his target, and acted rather callous and unhesitant. Usually undeterrable once he'd set his eyes on someone, after finding out that the new Spider-Man was his nephew, he refused to kill him. Aaron showed great remorse in death for being a bad example to his nephew and encouraged him to keep doing what was right. ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Prowler's Suit Capabilities:''' Despite not having any powers of his own, one equipped with the Prowler Suit is abled to increased his abilities to superhuman levels. **'''Enhanced Strength:''' The Prowler Claws greatly enhance Aaron's strength to the point he was able to slam Spider-Man into a wall, briefly knocking him out, with just his arms. **'''Enhanced Speed/Agility:''' With the Prowler boots Aaron can increase his running speed and climb and cling to walls in a similar fashion to Spider-Man and can jump much high than the average person. *'''Enhanced Durability''': The Prowler suit is able to allow Aaron to get thrown through walls and get right back up without any major injury.* ''To be added'' ===Abilities=== '''Expert Combatant:''' As the Prowler Aaron has impressive hand-to-hand combat skills, able to fight evenly Peter B. Parker. ==Equipment== *'''Prowler suit:''' In order to protect his identity and his body from damage, Aaron utilizes a special suit designed by Kingpin's scientists. ** '''Boots:''' The Prowler Suit also comes with two purple and black boots which can increase Aaron's speed. **'''Claws:''' The Prowler suit comes with two large claws which are able to easily tear through the metal hull of a truck and the walls and furniture inside of [[Aunt May's House|Aunt May's House.]] *'''Motorcycle:''' While chasing Miles through the streets of Brooklyn, Aaron utilizes a motorcycle to out-speed him. ==Relationships== ===Family=== *[[Jefferson Morales (Earth-1610)|Jefferson Morales]] - Brother *[[Rio Morales (Earth-1610)|Rio Morales]] - Sister-in-law *[[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|Miles Morales/Spider-Man]] - Nephew and brief enemy *[[Gloria Morales]] - Mother-in-law ===Allies=== *[[Alchemax (Earth-1610)|Alchemax]] **[[Norman Osborn (Earth-1610)|Norman Osborn/Green Goblin]] † - Ally ===Enemies=== *[[Spider-Gang]] - Enemies **[[Peter Parker (Earth-616)|Peter B. Parker/Spider-Man]] **[[Gwen Stacy (Earth-65)|Gwen Stacy/Spider-Woman]] **[[Peter Parker (Earth-90214)|Peter Parker/Spider-Man Noir]] **[[Peni Parker]] **[[Peter Porker|Peter Porker/Spider-Ham]] *Wilson Fisk Henchmen - Former Teammates **[[Wilson Fisk (Earth-1610)|Wilson Fisk/Kingpin]] - Former Boss, Former Ally and Killer. **[[Olivia Octavius|Olivia Octavius/Doctor Octopus]] - Former Ally **[[Lonnie Lincoln (Earth-1610)|Lonnie Lincoln/Tombstone]] - Former Ally **[[Maximus Gargan (Earth-1610)|Maximus Gargan/Scorpion]] - Former Ally *[[Peter Parker (Earth-1610)|Peter Parker/Spider-Man]] † - Enemy and Attempted Victim ==Gallery== The Prowler.jpg Prowler.jpg ==References== {{DEFAULTSORT:Davis, Aaron}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse characters]] [[Category:Male characters]] [[Category:Deceased characters]] [[Category:African Americans]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Villains]] [[Category:Aaron Davis]] [[Category:Earth-1610]]
